## Crypto\_2.decryptCollectionFile() function

Decrypts an encrypted collection file and returns the JSON content.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function decryptCollectionFile(tombstone: IEncryptedCollectionFile, key: Uint8Array, cryptoProvider: ICryptoProvider): Promise<Result<JsonObject>>;
```
